name: Emergent Ontology API
description: Read-only API for Emergent Ontology — a universal grammar of change based on nine primitive operators. Content is served from a live Xano database. No authentication required for public content.

live_api.note: Live database API. This is the primary content source. Query parameters are all optional.

parameters.record_id: Filter by record ID (e.g. wiki:operators, blog:first-post, site:index)
parameters.content_type: Filter by content type: wiki, blog, experiment, document, page

live_api.response_shape: Array of records. Each record has: record_id, displayName, values (JSON string containing meta and content blocks), lastModified.

manifest.description: This file — API discovery and endpoint listing

operators.description: The nine EO operators with symbols, codes, labels, and wiki links

content_types.wiki: Knowledge base articles about EO concepts and operators
content_types.experiment: Timestamped research entries (notes, datasets, results, charts)
